case_title: AVCO THRIFT, INC. VS DARANSKY, STEPHEN

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 412866 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVCO THRIFT, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DARANSKY, STEPHEN
